title: First principle politics, China chaos & outlook, state of private/public markets & more

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses first principle politics, analyzing each party's cynicism, and the chaos in China, including bank protests, housing protests, and slowing economic growth. They also cover the impact of automation and the state of private and public markets. Additionally, they touch on Amazon's acquisition of One Medical and BlackRock's loss of $1.7 trillion in investor money.

takeaways.text: China's economic growth is slowing down
Automation is impacting the information economy
BlackRock lost $1.7 trillion in investor money
US political parties are becoming more cynical
The US stock market is experiencing volatility
The hosts discuss the importance of first principle politics

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern about the slowing economic growth in China and the impact of automation on the workforce. They also discuss the volatility of the US stock market.

notable_moments.description: BlackRock's loss of $1.7 trillion in investor money
